---
title: "BarFigure_MidIncome_OADR_Phacha"
author: "Phacha"
date: "2026-04-14"
output: github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Middle-Income Dependency Ratio Analysis

```{r wealth-bar-chart, fig.width=16, fig.height=18, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# load
library(tidyverse)

# path
path_pop9 <- '/Users/phacha/Documents/R Projects/Final/POP_DPND.csv'
path_gni9 <- '/Users/phacha/Documents/R Projects/Final/API_NY.GNP.PCAP.CD_DS2_en_csv_v2_230.csv'

# data need
df_pop9 <- read_csv(path_pop9, skip = 4, show_col_types = FALSE)
df_gni9 <- read_csv(path_gni9, skip = 4, show_col_types = FALSE)

target_year9 <- "2024"

# clean Pop Data
pop_clean9 <- df_pop9 %>%
  select(`Country Code`, `Country Name`, all_of(target_year9)) %>%
  rename(Age_Dependency = all_of(target_year9))

# clean GNI Data
gni_clean9 <- df_gni9 %>%
  select(`Country Code`, all_of(target_year9)) %>%
  rename(GNI_per_capita = all_of(target_year9))

# create a list of World Bank regional aggregates to drop 
aggregates_to_drop <- c(
  "Europe & Central Asia (IDA & IBRD countries)", "Late-demographic dividend", 
  "East Asia & Pacific", "East Asia & Pacific (excluding high income)", 
  "East Asia & Pacific (IDA & IBRD countries)", "Upper middle income", 
  "Europe & Central Asia (excluding high income)", "IBRD only", 
  "Low & middle income", "Lower middle income", "Middle income", 
  "Low income", "Post-demographic dividend", "Pre-demographic dividend", 
  "Early-demographic dividend", "IDA total", "IDA blend", "IDA only", 
  "Sub-Saharan Africa", "Sub-Saharan Africa (IDA & IBRD countries)",
  "Sub-Saharan Africa (excluding high income)", "Latin America & Caribbean",
  "Latin America & Caribbean (excluding high income)", "Middle East & North Africa",
  "Arab World", "European Union", "Euro area", "North America", "OECD members",
  "St. Vincent and the Grenadines",
  "South Asia", 
  "South Asia (IDA & IBRD)", 
  "South Asia (excluding high income)",
  "Latin America & the Caribbean (IDA & IBRD countries)",
  "Latin America & Caribbean (IDA & IBRD countries)",
  "Middle East & North Africa (IDA & IBRD countries)",
  "Middle East & North Africa (excluding high income)",
  "World",
  "IDA & IBRD total",
  "IAD & IBRD Total"
)

# merge, filter, and categorize
final_df9 <- pop_clean9 %>%
  inner_join(gni_clean9, by = "Country Code") %>%
  filter(Age_Dependency >= 10) %>% 
  filter(!(`Country Name` %in% aggregates_to_drop)) %>%
  mutate(
    Income_Group = case_when(
      is.na(GNI_per_capita) ~ "Unknown",
      GNI_per_capita <= 1145 ~ "Low income (≤ $1,145)",
      GNI_per_capita <= 4515 ~ "Lower-middle income ($1,146 - $4,515)",
      GNI_per_capita <= 14005 ~ "Upper-middle income ($4,516 - $14,005)",
      TRUE ~ "High income (> $14,005)"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!Income_Group %in% c("Unknown", "High income (> $14,005)") | `Country Name` == "World")

# format factor for ordering
legend_order <- c(
  "Upper-middle income ($4,516 - $14,005)",
  "Lower-middle income ($1,146 - $4,515)",
  "Low income (≤ $1,145)",
  "High income (> $14,005)", 
  "Unknown"
)

final_df9 <- final_df9 %>%
  mutate(
    Income_Group = factor(Income_Group, levels = legend_order),
    `Country Name` = fct_reorder(`Country Name`, Age_Dependency)
  )

# Find Armenia's position
armenia_pos <- which(levels(final_df9$`Country Name`) == "Armenia")
line_position_armenia <- armenia_pos - 0.5

# Find Turkiye's position
turkiye_pos <- which(levels(final_df9$`Country Name`) %in% c("Turkiye", "Türkiye", "Turkey"))[1]
line_position_turkiye <- turkiye_pos - 0.5

# Define Color Map
color_map <- c(
  "Upper-middle income ($4,516 - $14,005)" = '#D65A31',
  "Lower-middle income ($1,146 - $4,515)" = "#E9C46A",
  "Low income (≤ $1,145)" = "#E76F51",
  "High income (> $14,005)" = "#264653",
  "Unknown" = "#9E9E9E"
)

# Create the plot
my_plot <- ggplot(final_df9, aes(x = Age_Dependency, y = `Country Name`, fill = Income_Group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(line_position_armenia, line_position_turkiye), 
             color = "#d73027", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("text", x = 37, y = line_position_armenia, 
           label = "20% Old-Age Threshold", color = "#d73027", 
           fontface = "bold", size = 6, vjust = -0.5, hjust = 1) +
  
  annotate("text", x = 37, y = line_position_turkiye, 
           label = "15% Old-Age Threshold", color = "#d73027", 
           fontface = "bold", size = 6, vjust = -0.5, hjust = 1) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_map) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(5, 40, by = 5)) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Getting Old Before Getting Rich",
    subtitle = "Middle-income nations will face mounting economic pressure in the coming decades.",
    caption = "Source: The World Bank (2024)",
    x = "Old Age Dependency Ratio (%)",
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Income Group Criteria"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 26, margin = margin(b = 8)),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "dimgrey", size = 20, margin = margin(b = 15)),
    plot.caption = element_text(color = "gray", size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0, margin = margin(t = 15)),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, color = "gray20", face = "plain"), 
    legend.position = "bottom", 
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), 
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE))

my_plot
```
